# Legitimate exceptions to check_pins_sync reverse leg (workflow → catalog).
#
# Format: `<workflow-basename>:<literal>  # <justification>`
#   * `<workflow-basename>` — file name only (no path)
#   * `<literal>`           — exact 40-hex or 64-hex string
#   * `<justification>`     — MANDATORY, describes why this drift is OK
#
# Lines beginning with `#` and blank lines are ignored. The `#` after the
# literal must carry human text — an empty justification is rejected by
# `check_pins_sync.py` so a silent allowlist cannot accumulate.
#
# Typical valid reasons:
#   * git commit SHA embedded in a workflow comment for documentation
#   * SHA anchored in a test fixture description
#   * one-off reference to an upstream release/tag SHA that is NOT a pin
#
# Empty at commit E landing time (reverse leg comes out clean on the
# 2026-07-23 tree). Entries here should be audited quarterly.
